workspaceState.note: No workspace scan, trace load, hardware probe, or provider call is performed.

availableWorkflows.label: SystemVerilog shape diagnostics
availableWorkflows.note: File-shape checks only; deeper diagnostics stay behind the same boundary.

availableWorkflows.label: Theme token contract
availableWorkflows.note: Minimal semantic slots for theme-neutral presentation.

availableWorkflows.label: Workflow descriptor catalog
availableWorkflows.note: Descriptor-only workflow metadata emitted from pccx-core.

availableWorkflows.label: Workflow proposal catalog
availableWorkflows.note: Proposal-only workflow previews emitted from pccx-core.

availableWorkflows.label: Workflow result summaries
availableWorkflows.note: Summary-only workflow result metadata; full logs are omitted.

availableWorkflows.label: Disabled allowlisted runner pilot
availableWorkflows.note: Fixed-args allowlist pilot; disabled unless explicitly enabled.

availableWorkflows.label: Compact verification dashboard
availableWorkflows.note: The GUI renders status data and does not own workflow logic.

pluginState.note: Plugin-facing contracts remain experimental; no stable plugin ABI is promised.

evidenceState.note: Status stays conservative until verified evidence exists in the proper workflow.

limitations: This is a CLI-backed GUI foundation, not a full GUI.
No MCP runtime is implemented by this boundary.
No provider, launcher, or editor runtime bridge is implemented by this boundary.
No hardware inference, throughput, or timing-closure result is claimed.
Theme presets are early semantic tokens, not a design system.
